description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, set on a green lawn with landscaping. The front features a double garage, a main entry with a small porch, and symmetrical windows with shutters. The side and rear views reveal a backyard with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and mature trees, as well as a small play structure and a hot tub. The windows are arranged in neat rows, and the house includes dormer windows on the upper floor. The driveway and walkway are paved, and the property is bordered by low hedges and shrubs. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with clean lines and balanced proportions.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, light walls, symmetrical windows, a double garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a backyard deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry porch, symmetrical windows with shutters, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage extension, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard with trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, hot tub, mature trees, and a play structure, with large windows and a back door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved driveway, side entry, and additional landscaping, as well as the rear deck and hot tub.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small covered porch, steps, and decorative columns, flanked by symmetrical windows and landscaping.
